name: capa_number_present
expression: capa_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(capa_number)) > 0
description: capa_number is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.

name: opened_date_present
expression: opened_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(opened_date)) > 0
description: opened_date is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.

name: problem_statement_present
expression: problem_statement IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(problem_statement)) > 0
description: problem_statement is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.

name: root_cause_present
expression: root_cause IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(root_cause)) > 0
description: root_cause is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.

name: owner_name_present
expression: owner_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(owner_name)) > 0
description: owner_name is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.

name: target_completion_date_present
expression: target_completion_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(target_completion_date)) > 0
description: target_completion_date is required for Corrective Preventive Action extraction.
